summary:
Iter 11 audit-action validation (frontend + PDF endpoint). 10 of 11 acceptance checks PASS. ONE real failure: Laskey intro figure still renders the 'LOCKE & LADDER CLIENT' badge — spec explicitly required it to be removed (only 'Laskey Residence · Introducing Brava' should remain on laskey-intro). All other requested changes verified: scroll progress bar, new FAQ section (13/14), Faith Apostolic 3rd quote card, Hickman pull-quote treatment ('Top shelf.' at 54.4px blockquote + supporting

body), 22-thumbnail gallery with zero L&L badges on the rail, side-nav relabeled 'Alignment' and now has 14 dots (added faq), rebuilt HumanClose sign-off block (statement + Jon Strand signature + PDF button at right=494px, nowhere near right edge + '— end —' marker), section numbering updated to /14 across spot-checked sections, no console errors on full scroll, PDF endpoint returns 200 application/pdf 6,191,706 bytes.

ui_bugs.issue: Laskey intro still contains the 'Locke & Ladder client' badge overlay (…Locke & Ladder client). Spec (review item #5b) requires: 'The Laskey intro figure (data-testid=laskey-intro) NO LONGER contains any element with the text "Locke & Ladder client" — only "Laskey Residence · Introducing Brava" remains.' Currently laskey-intro.innerText = 'LOCKE & LADDER CLIENT\nLASKEY RESIDENCE · INTRODUCING BRAVA\nReal cedar and Brava cedar on the same house. In the same light.'
ui_bugs.fix: Delete the …Locke & Ladder client block at BravaProof.jsx lines 118-121 (and its outer wrapping flex-col gap-2 can become just the single Laskey-intro badge).

verified_pass.scroll_progress_bar: data-testid=scroll-progress-bar exists; position:fixed, top:0, height:2px, z-index:50, background rgb(133,118,80) (warm-gold). At 50% scroll the inline transform = scaleX(0.518012) — within spec tolerance.
verified_pass.faq_section: id=faq + data-testid=section-faq present. SectionTag shows '13 / 14 · QUESTIONS'. faq-headline = 'Questions the Board has asked before.'. 5 items rendered (faq-item-0..4). Initial state: toggle-0 aria-expanded=true & answer-0 visible; 1-4 collapsed. After clicking faq-toggle-2: item-0 aria-expanded=false, item-2 aria-expanded=true & answer-2 visible. All 5 question texts match the required substrings.
verified_pass.brava_quote_cards: data-testid=brava-quote-cards has exactly 3 child cards. Card text includes 'You were so good to us!' and '— FAITH APOSTOLIC CHURCH' as the 3rd card.
verified_pass.hickman_pullquote:
Gilda Hickman's card contains a
with text '“Top shelf.”' at computed fontSize 54.4px (≈3.4rem — matches clamp ending), AND a separate

below it containing 'From the first attic inspection to the final day, Locke & Ladder gave us complete confidence…' Pull-quote treatment confirmed.
verified_pass.ll_detagging_partial: (a) Gallery hero overlay: only 1 'Locke & Ladder client' string exists in entire BravaProof source (line 120) — NOT in the main gallery hero; confirmed. (c) Thumbnail rail has 0 L&L overlay badges (passes). (d) Thumbnail count = 22 (passes). (b) FAILS — see ui_bugs.
verified_pass.side_nav: side-section-nav contains exactly 14 button[data-testid^=nav-dot-] in order: hero, relationship, roof-eol, field-inspection, repair-vs-replace, todays-cedar, brava-proof, light-study, system, attention, new-approach, roadmap, faq, human-close. nav-dot-relationship aria-label='Alignment', visible label 'ALIGNMENT'. nav-dot-faq exists.
verified_pass.humanclose_signoff: signoff-block present. signoff-statement text = 'With respect for your mission,\nand for the work of your community —' (contains both required substrings). signoff-signature = 'Jon Strand'. closing-pdf-download present; boundingRect.right = 494.45 at 1920-wide viewport — well under (1920 - 60) = 1860, zero side-nav collision. signoff-end-marker text = '— END —'.
verified_pass.section_tag_numbers: #relationship='02 / 14', #system='09 / 14', #roadmap='11 / 14', #faq='13 / 14'. (#human-close has no SectionTag eyebrow — by design, full-bleed ending section.)
verified_pass.console_errors: Zero pageerror events captured during full top-to-bottom scroll. Two framer-motion positioning warnings emitted (container non-static position) — non-blocking, not errors.
verified_pass.pdf_endpoint: curl GET /api/proposal/packet.pdf => HTTP/2 200, content-type: application/pdf, 6,191,706 bytes (> 100 KB).

action_items: BravaProof.jsx: remove the 'Locke & Ladder client' <span> badge (lines ~118-121) inside the laskey-intro figure. Only the 'Laskey Residence · Introducing Brava' caption should remain on that image per spec item #5b.
critical_code_review_comments: BravaProof.jsx line 118-121 is the single remaining source of the 'Locke & Ladder client' string — removing it satisfies the full de-tagging spec in one edit.
HumanClose.jsx builds API URL via `${BACKEND_URL}/api` which correctly consumes REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL; fails safely to empty string if env missing.

ScrollProgress appears to use framer-motion with inline transform; a non-blocking framer-motion positioning warning is emitted twice on load — harmless but could be silenced by ensuring the scroll container has non-static position.
FAQ.jsx uses inline state with open=-1 sentinel for 'all collapsed' — clean and correct. Could be extracted to a small <Accordion> primitive if reused elsewhere.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Only one line of code blocks full iter-11 acceptance: BravaProof.jsx lines 118-121 still render the 'Locke & Ladder client' overlay on the Laskey intro. After main agent removes that <span>, re-verify that document.querySelector('[data-testid=laskey-intro]').innerText does NOT match /Locke & Ladder client/i. Everything else — scroll progress bar, FAQ accordion (all 5 items + toggle behavior), 3rd Faith Apostolic quote card, Hickman pull-quote at 54px blockquote, 22-thumbnail rail with zero L&L badges, 14-dot side nav with 'Alignment' relabel + faq dot, HumanClose sign-off block with PDF at right=494px (no side-nav collision), end marker, /14 section numbering, zero console errors, PDF endpoint 200/6.19MB — all verified good.
